headline: Healthpeak Properties Raises 2026 Earnings Guidance Following Completion of the Janus Living IPO, Accretive Capital Allocation, and Strong First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: DENVER, May 05, 2026--Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC), a leading owner, operator, and developer of real estate for healthcare discovery and delivery, today announced results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
